transforms.code:
results = system.tag.readBlocking([
		"[Otto_FleetManager]MainControl/Runtime/LoopIsRunning",
		"[Otto_FleetManager]MainControl/Runtime/LoopLastResult"
	])
	isRunning = bool(results[0].value) if len(results) > 0 and results[0].quality.isGood() else False
	lastResult = str(results[1].value or "") if len(results) > 1 and results[1].quality.isGood() else ""
	if lastResult and "error" in lastResult.lower():
		return "#991b1b"
	if isRunning:
		return "#166534"
	return "#475569"

results = system.tag.readBlocking([
		"[Otto_FleetManager]MainControl/Runtime/LoopIsRunning",
		"[Otto_FleetManager]MainControl/Runtime/LoopLastResult"
	])
	isRunning = bool(results[0].value) if len(results) > 0 and results[0].quality.isGood() else False
	lastResult = str(results[1].value or "") if len(results) > 1 and results[1].quality.isGood() else ""
	if lastResult and "error" in lastResult.lower():
		return "Errored"
	if isRunning:
		return "Running"
	return "Idle"

transforms.expression: if(isNull({value}) || len(toStr({value})) = 0 || toStr({value}) = "Healthy", "All tracked controller phases are healthy.", toStr({value}))

transforms.code:
theme = str(value or "").lower()
	if "dark" in theme:
		return "#253041"
	return "#e5e7eb"
